CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Total_Volunteer_Hours__c), "", IF( Total_Volunteer_Hours__c >= $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Platinum.Hours_Required__c, $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Platinum.Milestone_Label__c, IF( Total_Volunteer_Hours__c >= $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Gold.Hours_Required__c, $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Gold.Milestone_Label__c, IF( Total_Volunteer_Hours__c >= $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Silver.Hours_Required__c, $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Silver.Milestone_Label__c, IF( Total_Volunteer_Hours__c >= $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Bronze.Hours_Required__c, $CustomMetadata.Volunteer_Milestone__mdt.Bronze.Milestone_Label__c, "" ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Current Milestone
